name: helgesverre/libui
description: Native desktop GUI for PHP 8.3+ via libui-ng and FFI.

scripts-descriptions.regen: Regenerate src/Native/libui.gen.h and src/Generated/* from ui.h
scripts-descriptions.docs:api: Regenerate docs/API.md from the public API surface (reflection-based)
scripts-descriptions.test: Run the full PHPUnit test suite
scripts-descriptions.test:coverage: Run tests with code coverage reporting
scripts-descriptions.gate: Verify FFI::cdef accepts the full generated header (PHPUnit @group gate)
scripts-descriptions.smoke: Construct widgets via the OO layer, no event loop (PHPUnit @group smoke)
scripts-descriptions.format:check: Check code formatting without making changes
scripts-descriptions.lint:check: Check code style without making changes
scripts-descriptions.analyse: Run full code analysis (lint, format, stan, tests)
